market_overview.headline: Market shows constructive pullback structure with QQQ leading tech strength while SPY consolidates near highs.
market_overview.detail: 40% of stocks in Full Bull vs only 13% in Full Bear. QQQ at Full Bull signal while SPY in unstacked bullish structure suggests healthy sector rotation rather than broad breakdown.

momentum_themes.headline: Tech Hardware Rally Accelerating
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology sector leading with explosive momentum in optical/storage names. Memory/semiconductor equipment showing renewed institutional buying after extended bases.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Dominance, Tech Services Lagging

strongest.note: Perfect bullish score with all 14 names showing strength, mostly in pullback phases
Materials benefiting from infrastructure/commodity themes with solid momentum
Industrial strength continues with 14 of 18 names in Full Bull structure

weakest.note: Software/cloud names struggling despite recent META strength, broad sector weakness
Healthcare services under pressure, all 4 names showing bearish structure
Business services sector completely bearish, secular headwinds evident

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation into cyclicals and out of growth/tech services. Energy dominance reflects commodity strength while tech software faces multiple compression.

items.text: Technology services showing broad weakness with 76% of names bearish despite market strength
Healthcare breakdown accelerating - both services and technology subsectors deteriorating
SPY EMA crossover risks with 13W threatening to cross below 21W could signal broader weakness
High volume selling in EOG and other energy names suggests potential institutional distribution
